title: How do I delete files from an item every period of time?
excerpt:
Is there to do that on Monday or does it have to be via “Make”. 
If so, what should be the process on Make? 
I need the files to be deleted every 2 months since the creation date of the item on Monday. 
Thanks!

I tried this method, however, it clears the file from the column but doesn’t delete the file from the item itself (in its files gallery).
